sections.paragraph:
βύσσινος, η, ον (s. βύσσος; Aeschyl., Hdt.+; Plut.; Diod S 1, 85, 5; OGI 90, 17; 29; pap [PRev 103, 1; PEleph 26, 4; 27a, 11ff et al.]; LXX; JosAs 3:19; 13:2 cod. A; ApcMos 40; EpArist 87; 320; Jos., Ant. 3, 153; Test12Patr) made of fine linen, subst. τὸ β. fine linen, linen garment (PHolm 15, 26; PGM 1, 332; 4, 663; Esth 1:6; Is 3:23; Da 10:5; 12:6f) Rv 18:12 (s. βύσσος end), 16; 19:8, 14.—DELG s.v. βύσσος. M-M.

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

PRev PRev = Revenue Laws of Ptolemy Philadelphus—List 4

PEleph PEleph = Elephantine-Papyri—List 4

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

JosAs JosAs = Joseph and Aseneth—Lists 2, 5

ApcMos ApcMos = Apocalypse of Moses—List 2

EpArist EpArist = Epistle of Aristeas, II b.c.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Test12Patr Test12Patr = Testaments of the Twelve Patriarchs, with interpolations II b.c.–III a.d.—List 2

subst. subst. = substantive(ly)

PHolm PHolm = Papyrus Graecus Holmiensis—List 4

PGM PGM = Papyri Graecae Magicae—List 4

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 185
